_doc: Char-count baseline for each LLM-facing payload. PromptSizeProbeTest derives ceiling as chars × 1.15 in code; there is no manual ceiling here. On growth past ceiling: trim the prompt. On shrinkage below 'chars': run `bazel run //src/test:update_prompt_baselines` to rewrite this file, then commit. Each entry carries 'updatedBy' (PR or issue ref) and 'reason' for audit trail; the updater stamps 'auto' / dated 'regenerated' when an entry changes, leaving you to refine those fields before committing.

contractPrompt.reason: bpmner/extract_contract.jinja + element includes. Includes restored section-separator blank lines per review feedback.

contractFullPayload.reason: Rendered extract_contract.jinja concatenated with FlatProcessContract schema-format text (FilteringJacksonOutputConverter.format).

generationPrompt.reason: bpmner/generate_bpmn.jinja. Includes a blank line after the naming-shape-advice loop per review feedback.

generationFullPayload.reason: Rendered generate_bpmn.jinja concatenated with FlatBpmnDefinition schema-format text.

alignmentPrompt.reason: bpmner/check_alignment.jinja. Includes section-separator blank lines around Semantic Elements / Sequence Flows / Unreachable Elements / Alignment Task.

alignmentFullPayload.reason: Rendered check_alignment.jinja concatenated with AlignmentFindings schema-format text.

readinessPrompt.reason: bpmner/assess_readiness.jinja. Includes section-separator blank lines after the dimensions list, missing-areas list, and before the clarification-history block.

readinessFullPayload.reason: Rendered assess_readiness.jinja concatenated with ProcessInputAssessment schema-format text.

repairPatchPrompt.reason: bpmner/repair/patch_feedback.jinja rendered via BpmnRepairPromptFactory.patchFeedback with one canonical ERROR-severity diagnostic.

repairFullPrompt.reason: bpmner/repair/full_feedback.jinja rendered via BpmnRepairPromptFactory.fullRepairFeedback with one canonical ERROR-severity diagnostic and the sample definition.
